history: The client has a history of substance abuse and has completed rehabilitation. He is experiencing ongoing family difficulties, particularly with his mother, which he describes as feelings of 'rejection and emotional neglect.' He has struggled with obesity since childhood, which has been a source of bullying.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: If I avoid family interactions, then I can protect myself from rejection and emotional pain.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't engage with my family, then I won't have to face the inevitable disappointment and rejection.
coping_strategies: The client avoids family interactions and uses the Internet as a distraction to cope with underlying emotional distress. He also practices self-regulation techniques to manage his mood.
situation: Received an invitation to a cousin's upcoming wedding. Has not responded to the RSVP request and has not answered follow-up calls from family members.
auto_thought: If I go to the wedding, I'll just end up feeling rejected and humiliated.
behavior: The client avoids responding to the RSVP and ignores follow-up calls from family members.
